title: Hollywood Reporter: Zach Lipovsky, Adam B. Stein to Direct Metal Gear Solid Film
content: The duo stated, " Metal Gear Solid was nothing short of a groundbreaking cinematic masterpiece that forever revolutionized video games. We are thrilled and honored to bring Hideo Kojima 's iconic characters and unforgettable world to life." The website states that Avi Arad and Ari Arad are both still producing the…
author: ANN

title: Exit 8 Live-Action Film Streams Final English-Subtitled Trailer
content: North American film distribution company NEON (Oscar-winning films Parasite , Anora U.S. distributor) began streaming the final English-subtitled trailer on Wednesday for its North American release the live-action film of the KOTAKE CREATE 's infinite-loop horror game Exit 8 ( 8-Ban Deguchi ).
author: ANN

title: 2nd Gundam Hathaway Film Streams English Dub Trailer
content: Bandai Namco Filmworks streamed on Thursday an English-dubbed trailer for Mobile Suit Gundam Hathaway: The Sorcery of Nymph Circe ( Kidō Senshi Gundam: Senkō no Hathaway - Circe no Majo ), the second film of the Mobile Suit Gundam Hathaway ( Kidō Senshi Gundam Senkō no Hathaway ) anime project : The film opened in…
author: ANN

title: Shonen Jump Ends One of Its Funniest Manga
content: Weekly Shonen Jump has been responsible for introducing the anime world to some of its biggest franchises. While Shueisha might not be creating the anime adaptations themselves, the manga publisher is giving creators the chance to forge stories that populate the medium.
author: ComicBook

title: Shakugan no Shana Series Gets Browser Game
content: CTW Inc. announced on Wednesday that Yashichiro Takahashi 's Shakugan no Shana light novel series is inspiring a new browser game titled Shakugan no Shana Blaze Edge , or Shana Blaze for short. The game is free-to-play with in-app purchases. Pre-registration is open.
author: ANN

title: Nintendo Releases Hello, Yoshi! App on Switch, Smartphones
content: Nintendo released the Hello, Yoshi app for free on Nintendo Switch and smartphones on Thursday. The app is part of "My Mario," a new line of Mario-themed products aimed at young children. The brand line includes kid-friendly, one-minute stop-motion animation episodes on the official Play Nintendo YouTube channel.
author: ANN

title: Gundam’s Latest Crossover Has To Be Seen To Be Believed
content: Mobile Suit Gundam has had some wild crossovers in the past, with the mech franchise making its way into some unexpected avenues. For example, the original Gundam that started it all teamed up with Sanrio’s Hello Kitty for an animated special that saw mech fighting feline in outer space.
author: ComicBook

title: Rhythm Heaven Groove Game Launches on July 2
content: Nintendo announced on its Nintendo Today! app on Thursday that it will release Rhythm Heaven Groove , a new game in the Rhythm Heaven series, for Nintendo Switch on July 2. Nintendo also streamed a video of one of the rhythm minigames "Slice N Dice Kitchen:" Rhythm Heaven Megamix ( Rhythm Tengoku: The Best+ ) debuted…
author: ANN

title: 6th Be Forever Yamato: Rebel 3199 Film's 2nd Teaser Video Streamed
content: Bandai Namco Filmworks revealed a second teaser video on Friday for the sixth film in Yamato yo Towa ni: Rebel 3199 ( Be Forever Yamato : Rebel 3199), the latest project in the Space Battleship Yamato remakes. The below video previews the "Galaxy" as it departs from the moon's surface.
author: ANN

title: Anime Horror Movie Series Releases New Trailer For Final Film
content: While the anime world has its bases covered when it comes to action series and stories of romantic comedies, there is one genre that never seems to be able to hit the same heights.
author: ComicBook
